fields.name: SyftBox
fields.description: Connect your SyftBox datasite. Use OTP verification to link storage and access distributed files.
fields.setup_guide:
## SyftBox

SyftBox does not use Docker or MCP subprocess tools. Connect via OTP to link your SyftBox account and enable distributed file storage.

1. Open this integration in DARE
2. Request an OTP sent to your account email
3. Enter the code to verify and connect

Requires `SYFTBOX_ENABLED=True` on the server.
